context: Tests factual preservation under aggressive voice transformation. The source is a dense technical benchmark report with dozens of precise numbers. The target voice (john-roberts) is conversational and premise-driven -- the opposite of a benchmark report. Every number must survive exactly while the voice transforms dramatically. This is the hardest quality gate test.

checklist.name: Voice transformation applied
checklist.description: The output reads conversationally, not like a benchmark report. Prose flows as narrative rather than tabular data dumps. Sentence structure reflects john-roberts style: deceptively simple, premise-driven logic.

checklist.name: tpmC result preserved
checklist.description: The exact number 287,431 tpmC appears in the output

checklist.name: Improvement percentage preserved
checklist.description: The 23.7% improvement over PostgreSQL 15.4 is stated in the output

checklist.name: p99 latency preserved
checklist.description: The p99 latency values 12.3 ms and 18.9 ms both appear in the output

checklist.name: Deadlock rates preserved
checklist.description: Both deadlock rates (0.0034% and 0.0009%) appear in the output

checklist.name: Transaction mix preserved
checklist.description: At least the New Order (44.8%) and Payment (43.1%) percentages appear in the output

checklist.name: CPU utilization preserved
checklist.description: The 73.2% average and 89.4% peak CPU utilization values appear in the output

checklist.name: SVE benefit preserved
checklist.description: The 14.6% hash join improvement from SVE instructions appears in the output

checklist.name: Cost-per-transaction preserved
checklist.description: The cost-per-transaction values ($0.0000034 and $0.0000047) and the 27.5% cost advantage appear in the output

checklist.name: Instance types preserved
checklist.description: Instance type identifiers c7g.8xlarge and c6i.8xlarge appear in the output

checklist.name: Configuration values preserved
checklist.description: At least shared_buffers (16 GB), effective_cache_size (48 GB), and work_mem (64 MB) appear in the output

checklist.name: Commit hash preserved
checklist.description: The commit hash a]b7c2e3f appears in the output

checklist.name: Total cost preserved
checklist.description: The total benchmark cost of $4.30 ($2.43 + $1.87) appears in the output

checklist.name: No AI anti-patterns introduced
checklist.description: The transformation does not introduce any of the 18 AI anti-patterns: no contrastive negation, no parallel binaries, no AI vocabulary, no copula avoidance, no low burstiness, etc.

checklist.name: No fabricated experience
checklist.description: The output does not fabricate personal benchmarking experience ('I ran these tests...', 'What struck me about the numbers...')

checklist.name: Summary provided
checklist.description: The skill provides a brief summary noting the mode, voice shift, and any anti-patterns caught
